# PLAN.md
<!-- Generated by sriflow-plan v4.0.0 — BA Pipeline -->

## Goal

Build a personal finance tracker web app for a 4-5 person team with 3-tier roles (Admin, Manager, Member). Features: expense entry, categories, monthly summaries, budget alerts, approval workflow, CSV/PDF export. Self-hosted on Sri's laptop, no external services.

---

## Stakeholder Register

| ID | Name | Role | Power | Interest | Top Uncertainty |
|----|------|------|-------|----------|-----------------|
| S1 | Sri | Sponsor, Builder, Admin | High | High | What's the minimum viable feature set for a 4-5 person team? |
| S2 | Team Member 1 | Manager | Medium | High | How do managers approve budgets without creating bottlenecks? |
| S3 | Team Member 2 | Manager | Medium | High | Same as S2 — approval workflow clarity |
| S4 | Team Member 3 | Member | Low | High | How easy is expense entry? Mobile support? |
| S5 | Team Member 4 | Member | Low | High | Same as S4 — entry UX and category management |
| S6 | External Auditor | Auditor (read-only) | Medium | Medium | What data do auditors need? Export format? |

**Role Definitions:**
- **Admin (Sri):** Full system access, manage users/roles, configure categories/budgets, view all data
- **Managers (S2, S3):** Approve budget allocations, view team expenses, generate reports
- **Members (S4, S5):** Log own expenses, view own spending summaries
- **Auditor (S6):** Read-only access to all expense data, export capabilities

**Detailed artifacts:** `01_discovery/stakeholder-register.md`, `01_discovery/power-interest-map.md`, `01_discovery/uncertainty-priority.md`

---

## Requirements

### BRD Summary
- **Total Requirements:** 26 functional + 24 non-functional
- **All requirements trace to use cases**
- **Uncertainty scores:** All ≥ 7/10

**Key functional requirements:**
- BRD-01.1: Log expenses with date, amount, category, description
- BRD-02.1: Default categories (Food, Transport, Entertainment, Utilities, Other)
- BRD-03.1: Monthly summaries by category with budget comparison
- BRD-04.1: Budget limits per category with periods (monthly/quarterly/annual)
- BRD-05.1: Approval workflow with auto-approve after 48 hours
- BRD-06.1: CSV and PDF export with audit trail

**Full BRD:** `04_requirements/BRD.md`

| ID | User Story | Use Case | INVEST | GWT |
|----|------------|----------|--------|-----|
| US-01 | Log an expense | UC-01 | ✅ | ✅ |
| US-02 | Auto-categorize expenses | UC-01 | ✅ | ✅ |
| US-03 | View monthly summaries | UC-02 | ✅ | ✅ |
| US-04 | Compare months | UC-02 | ✅ | ✅ |
| US-05 | Set budgets | UC-03 | ✅ | ✅ |
| US-06 | Budget alerts | UC-03 | ✅ | ✅ |
| US-07 | Approve budgets | UC-04 | ✅ | ✅ |
| US-08 | Batch approval | UC-04 | ✅ | ✅ |
| US-09 | Export CSV | UC-05 | ✅ | ✅ |
| US-10 | Export PDF | UC-05 | ✅ | ✅ |
| US-11 | Manage categories | UC-06 | ✅ | ✅ |
| US-12 | Reorder categories | UC-06 | ✅ | ✅ |

**Full stories:** `04_requirements/backlog/US-01-log-expense.md` through `US-12-reorder-categories.md`

## UI & Data

### Screens

| ID | Screen | Purpose |
|----|--------|---------|
| SCREEN-01 | Dashboard | Main landing page with overview |
| SCREEN-02 | Expense Entry | Form for logging new expenses |
| SCREEN-03 | Monthly Summary | Detailed view of spending for a month |
| SCREEN-04 | Budget Management | Set and manage budget limits |
| SCREEN-05 | Approval Queue | Manager view of pending requests |
| SCREEN-06 | Export | Export expense data |
| SCREEN-07 | Category Management | Admin interface for categories |

**Full specs:** `05_ui-and-data/screens/screen-specifications.md`

### Data Dictionary
- **Entities:** 6 (User, Category, Expense, Budget, Approval, AuditLog)
- **All fields:** type, validation, behavior, rule defined
- **Relationships:** documented
- **Indexes:** defined
- **Constraints:** documented

**Full dictionary:** `05_ui-and-data/data-dictionary.md`

---

## Architecture

### Technology Stack

| Layer | Technology | Rationale |
|-------|------------|-----------|
| Frontend | React + TypeScript | Component-based, type-safe |
| Backend | Node.js + Express | Simple, lightweight |
| Database | SQLite | Zero-config, sufficient for 10K records |
| Authentication | JWT + bcrypt | Stateless, secure |
| File Storage | Local filesystem | Self-hosted, no external services |

### NFR Summary

| Category | Key Metric | Target |
|----------|------------|--------|
| Performance | Page load | < 2 seconds |
| Performance | API response | < 200 milliseconds |
| Availability | Uptime | 99.9% |
| Security | Encryption | AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit |
| Scalability | Concurrent users | 10 users |
| Scalability | Data volume | 10,000 expenses |
| Cost | Infrastructure | $0 (self-hosted) |
| Usability | Entry time | < 30 seconds |

**Full NFR:** `06_architecture/NFR.md`
**Full system design:** `06_architecture/system-design.md`

---

## Implementation Sequence

| # | Task | Effort (human) | Effort (AI) | Depends on |
|---|------|----------------|-------------|------------|
| 1 | Project setup (React + Express + SQLite) | 2 hours | 30 min | None |
| 2 | Database schema (6 tables) | 1 hour | 15 min | #1 |
| 3 | Authentication (JWT + bcrypt) | 3 hours | 1 hour | #2 |
| 4 | Category CRUD (US-11, US-12) | 2 hours | 30 min | #3 |
| 5 | Expense entry (US-01, US-02) | 4 hours | 1 hour | #4 |
| 6 | Monthly summary (US-03, US-04) | 3 hours | 1 hour | #5 |
| 7 | Budget management (US-05, US-06) | 3 hours | 1 hour | #6 |
| 8 | Approval workflow (US-07, US-08) | 4 hours | 1 hour | #7 |
| 9 | Export (US-09, US-10) | 3 hours | 1 hour | #8 |
| 10 | Dashboard (SCREEN-01) | 3 hours | 1 hour | #9 |
| 11 | Testing (unit + integration) | 4 hours | 2 hours | #10 |
| 12 | Deployment (Docker) | 2 hours | 30 min | #11 |
| **Total** | | **34 hours** | **9.75 hours** | |

---

## Risk Flags

| # | Risk | Impact | Mitigation |
|---|------|--------|------------|
| 1 | SQLite scalability | High — may not handle 10,000 records efficiently | Monitor performance, consider PostgreSQL if needed |
| 2 | Mobile responsiveness | Medium — may not work well on small screens | Test on mobile early, use responsive frameworks |
| 3 | Receipt storage | Low — local filesystem may fill up | Implement cleanup policy, limit file sizes |

---

## Open Questions

| # | Question | Stakeholder | Priority |
|---|----------|-------------|----------|
| 1 | Should we add email notifications for alerts? | Sri | Low |
| 2 | Do we need PDF report templates? | Auditor | Medium |
| 3 | Should we implement dark mode? | Members | Low |
